scope: Google Calendar + Microsoft Teams/Outlook OAuth API sync for CRM Tasks

commands.notes: Repository baseline contains extensive pre-existing TypeScript errors in unrelated modules/pages; this WO did not resolve global type debt.
No new shells introduced; gate passed.

user_visible_changes: CRM Tasks now shows Google and Microsoft connection status with connect/reconnect actions.
Save Reminder can create real provider events (Google Meet or Teams) when connected, and stores event/join links in task details.
Fallback deep-link behavior remains available when provider sync is not connected or feature-flagged off.
